reviews.comment:

Good place to stop and eat something under the trees at benches and tables that you can use without being a member.

reviews.comment:
Baños limpios y nuevos. Poco espacio en el local. Un contingente no entra, faltan mesas. Hay mesas afuera pero si el tiempo está fresco no se pueden utilizar. Las medialunas son como comer telgopor, olvidables.

(Translated by Google)
Clean and new restrooms. The place is small. A large group won't fit; there aren't enough tables. There are tables outside, but they're unusable if the weather is cool. The croissants are like eating Styrofoam—forgettable.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9804125904812315909/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMtb0kya3VnRRAB
